nodes.name: Webhook — Trigger Invoice
nodes.notes: POST JSON: { client_name, client_email, service_path, package_label, setup_fee, monthly_fee, currency, proposal_signed_date, work_start_date }. Called manually after proposal is signed, or triggered from workflow 05.

values.content:
You are Idris-Michael Bakare of Severus Connects. Write a professional, warm payment kick-off email to a new client. The email should:
1. Confirm the engagement and express genuine enthusiasm
2. State the setup fee clearly and explain what it covers
3. Provide payment instructions (Stripe link placeholder)
4. Set expectations: work begins within 48h of cleared payment
5. Tell them what happens next (intake call or brief questionnaire)
6. Be under 200 words, plain text, professional but human

Return only the email body (no subject line). Sign as Idris.

nodes.name: Stripe — Create Payment Link
nodes.notes: Creates a Stripe payment link for setup fee. Requires Stripe API credential in n8n.

parameters.subject: =✅ {{ $('Webhook — Trigger Invoice').first().json.package_label }} — Next Steps & Payment

nodes.name: Wait — 48 Hours
nodes.notes: If payment not received in 48h, send a polite reminder

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Payment cleared — begin onboarding', client_name: $('Webhook — Trigger Invoice').first().json.client_name, client_email: $('Webhook — Trigger Invoice').first().json.client_email, service_path: $('Webhook — Trigger Invoice').first().json.service_path, paid: true }) }}

nodes.name: HTTP — Trigger Onboarding (Intake)
nodes.notes: Triggers workflow 02-sc-intake to begin full client onboarding

parameters.subject: =Quick reminder — {{ $('Webhook — Trigger Invoice').first().json.package_label }} payment
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Webhook — Trigger Invoice').first().json.client_name }},

Just a friendly nudge — your payment link is still open whenever you're ready:

{{ $('Stripe — Create Payment Link').first().json.url }}

Let me know if you have any questions or need to adjust anything.

Idris
Severus Connects

meta.description: Triggered after proposal is signed. Creates Stripe payment link for setup fee. Sends branded payment email to client (BCC to Idris). Waits 48h, checks payment status. If cleared → triggers intake/onboarding. If not → sends polite reminder. Logs everything to Obsidian.
